channel.title: Jetpack-Compose on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Jetpack-Compose on Make Things Happen

item.title: Observations of migrating an app from XML to Jetpack Compose
item.description: Jetpack Compose is the coolest kid on the block, but it has various different drawbacks that I at least notice when we did the migration of the app I was working on. And I wanted to share them in my blog with everyone, just in case you need to do the same thing in your app.
